title: Electric Shower - Triton Cara (Perluso, Madrid 2, Seville, Enrich) - 9.5kW
features: Multiple Cable and water entry points
Outlet product - 2 year parts and labour guarantee (UK only)

Will replace Triton Perluso, Madrid 2, Forte, Cara, Castano, Seville, Rapide 2 Plus, Rapide 3 Plus, Rapide R1, Amber 3, Ivory 2, Aviva (Refurbished), Alicante, Caselona, Enchant, Enrich, Sambada and Aquatronic 1 Plus models
description: The Cara shower is a popular choice, offering excellent value for money. It's easy to use, with separate power and temperature controls. The shower comes with multiple cable and water entry points on both sides of the unit, making this a great replacement product. Plumbing System: Cold Mains Minimum Running Pressure/Flow Required: 1 Bar @ 8 l/min Maximum Static Pressure: 10 Bar
